# Simmons Mortgage — Stef Simmons, Mortgage Broker

> Stef Simmons is an independent mortgage broker ("Your mortgage BFF") backed by
> Barrett Financial Group, LLC. She provides honest, personal home-financing
> guidance and shops multiple lenders to find each client the best rate and fit.

## Key facts
- Broker: Stef Simmons, NMLS #1607894
- Company: Barrett Financial Group, LLC, NMLS #181106
- Phone / text: (503) 481-7866
- Email: simmons@barrettfinancial.com
- Office: 6 N Everett Street, Kennewick, WA 99336
- Apply online: https://181106.my1003app.com/1607894/register
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/steftalks

## Areas served
- The Tri-Cities, Washington: Kennewick, Pasco, Richland, West Richland, Benton City, Burbank, Finley
- All of Washington state
- Oregon, including the Portland metro (Stef was originally Portland-based and remains very active in Oregon)
- Texas (high volume of Texas home loans)
- Also licensed in Idaho, Arizona, and Wyoming

## Loan products
- Conventional home loans
- FHA loans (great for first-time buyers)
- VA loans (for veterans and service members)
- USDA loans (eligible rural/suburban homes)
- Jumbo loans
- Refinancing and cash-out refinance
- HELOCs and down-payment assistance programs

## Pages
- Home: https://www.callmyfriendstef.com/
- Privacy policy: https://www.callmyfriendstef.com/privacy.html
